div1.entryFree:
Project, subst. 1) a chalking out, a forming in the mind, an idea: she cannot love, nor take no shape nor p. of affection, she is so self-endeared, Ado III, 1, 55. flattering himself in p. of a power much smaller than the smallest of his thoughts, H4B I, 3, 29 (Ff with p.).
2) a scheme, design: Tp. II, 1, 299. IV, 175. V, 1. Epil. V, 1 All's I, 1, 243. Wint. IV, 4, 535. Troil. I, 3, 385. II, 2, 134. Cor. V, 6, 34. Hml. IV, 7, 153.
